reference: This is the description of a throbbing headache with visual disturbances. Rule out any refractive errors in her, which are more common in this age group. A migraine headache can mimic this. She will need a proper workup for the same.
text: This is the description of the garden that I received as a result. You are in the pathway of a man with a more common goal, to make him a better human being, to make him a better person than he is.
